repository.description: The repository where the commit was made.

branch.description: The branch name where the commit was made.

created_at.description: The creation date and time of the commit.

url.description: URL for accessing the commit data.

node_id.description: The unique identifier of the commit node.

html_url.description: URL for viewing the commit on GitHub.

comments_url.description: URL for accessing comments on the commit.

commit.description: Information about the commit including author, committer, tree, and verification details.

author.description: Information about the author of the commit.

name.description: Name of the author of the commit.

email.description: Email of the author of the commit.

date.description: The date and time of the commit authored.

committer.description: Information about the committer who applied the commit.

name.description: Name of the committer of the commit.

email.description: Email of the committer of the commit.

date.description: The date and time of the commit committed.

tree.description: Details about the tree object associated with the commit.

url.description: URL for accessing the commit tree.
URL for accessing the commit details.

comment_count.description: Number of comments on the commit.

verified.description: Indicates if the commit is verified.

parents.description: List of parent commits of the current commit.

url.description: URL for accessing the parent commit details.

html_url.description: URL for viewing the parent commit on GitHub.

stats.description: Commit change counts returned by GitHub when Fetch Commit Stats is enabled.

additions.description: Number of lines added by the commit.

deletions.description: Number of lines deleted by the commit.

total.description: Total number of changed lines in the commit.

files.description: Files changed by the commit returned by GitHub when Fetch Commit Stats is enabled.

additions.description: Number of lines added to the file.

deletions.description: Number of lines deleted from the file.

changes.description: Total number of changed lines in the file.

blob_url.description: URL for viewing the file blob on GitHub.

raw_url.description: URL for the raw file contents on GitHub.

contents_url.description: URL for accessing the file contents through the GitHub API.

patch.description: Patch text for the file, when returned by GitHub.

previous_filename.description: Previous file path for renamed files.
